page.title: Tenants
page.subtitle: Super admin: create tenants, edit metadata, and impersonate for support.
page.listHelp: Each tenant has its own products, registers, and receipts.

accessDenied.title: Access denied
accessDenied.body: Only super administrators may open this page.

fields.name: Tenant name
fields.slugHint: Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphen only — e.g. cafe-example (not cafe-example.regkasse.at).
fields.slugPreviewEmpty: Enter a valid slug to preview the URL.

validation.contactEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

slug.required: Please enter a subdomain slug (e.g. cafe-example).
slug.invalid: Use a–z, 0–9 and hyphen only; do not paste the full host (e.g. test.regkasse.at).
slug.reserved: This slug is reserved (e.g. admin, www).
slug.availabilityFailed: Could not check availability. Please try again.

create.title: New tenant
create.subtitle: Create a tenant with its own subdomain. Administrator access is created automatically.
create.autoProvisionDescription: Main register, administrator (password shown once), and demo category with 3 products.
create.adminEmailAutoDescription: After creation, sign in with {{email}}. The password is shown on the next screen.

sections.contactOptional: Phone and address are optional. Contact email is required for system notifications.

name.label: Company name
name.hint: This name appears on your receipts and invoices.

errors.tooShort: Company name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.tooLong: Company name must be at most 200 characters.

slug.label: Subdomain
slug.tooltip: The address for your register and admin panel
slug.hint: Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only. Example: cafe-example

errors.pattern: Only lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens are allowed
errors.invalid: Only lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens; do not paste the full domain.
errors.reserved: This subdomain is reserved (e.g. admin, www).
errors.availabilityFailed: Could not check availability. Please try again.

contactEmail.label: Email (contact)
contactEmail.hint: We send important system notifications to this address.

errors.required: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.invalid: Please enter a valid email address.

phone.label: Phone
phone.hint: 📞 For support only — never used for marketing.

errors.invalid: Please enter a valid phone number (e.g. +43 123 456789).

errors.tooLong: Address must be at most 500 characters.

adminEmail.label: Admin access (created automatically)
adminEmail.tooltip: Use these credentials to sign in
adminEmail.hint: 🔐 The password is shown ONCE after creation.

grantTrialLicense.label: ✅ Enable 30-day demo license
grantTrialLicense.tooltip: 30 days free trial, renewal available afterwards
grantTrialLicense.subtext: After 30 days you can purchase a paid license

provisioning.title: Tenant “{{name}}” provisioned
provisioning.missingWarning: Automatic setup could not be confirmed. Please verify the tenant or contact support.
provisioning.passwordWarning: The administrator password is shown only once. Store it securely or hand it off to the tenant.
provisioning.nextStepLogin: Sign in with the credentials above

confirmDelete.title: Delete tenant?
confirmDelete.body: Soft delete sets status to deleted.

impersonationRedirect.title: Redirecting to tenant …
impersonationRedirect.hint: Signing in on the tenant domain. Please wait.

errors.missing_token: No sign-in token was found in the redirect.
errors.missing_tenant: No tenant was specified in the redirect.
errors.tenant_mismatch: Tenant does not match this subdomain.
errors.not_impersonation: Token is not an impersonation token.
errors.expired: Impersonation token has expired. Start again from admin.regkasse.at.
